series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, posts made or approved by the Accountancy Board (ACC) on its public website and/or social media sites such as Facebook. LinkedIn, etc. that are made to promote the Board and share information that is of interest of the citizens of Ohio and the public. This information can include but is not limited to: press releases, photos, videos. events, meeting minutes, orders and decisions, announcements, frequently asked questions, annual reports, meeting schedules and information, information regarding education, experience, examination, application, and licensing requirements, and general information about ACC and the services it provides. Social media systems or platforms are maintained by the owners of the systems or platforms and not ACC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: updated or no longer of administrative value
